projects.name: The Line
projects.tagline: A Tribute to The Bear TV Series
projects.description: A modern, responsive restaurant website for 'The Line', a fine dining establishment set in Chicago's River North neighborhood. Built as a loving tribute to the TV show 'The Bear', this project showcases elegant design, smooth animations, and a sophisticated user experience using only vanilla technologies.
key_features: Fully responsive design for all devices
Elegant typography and layout inspired by fine dining aesthetics
Vanilla JavaScript (no frameworks) for optimal performance
highlights: Built entirely with vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript - no frameworks needed
Demonstrates strong fundamentals in web development
Tribute to the acclaimed TV series 'The Bear'
Focuses on user experience and visual storytelling
projects.what_i_learned: This project reinforced my vanilla JavaScript skills and taught me the importance of thoughtful design in creating immersive web experiences. It also showed me how technical excellence and creative vision can work together.

projects.name: Shell Style Portfolio
projects.description: An interactive portfolio website that simulates a terminal/command-line interface. Instead of traditional navigation, visitors interact with my professional information through terminal commands, creating a unique and engaging experience for developers and tech enthusiasts.
key_features: Fully functional terminal emulator in the browser
Responsive design that works on all devices
highlights: Unique, interactive approach to a portfolio website
Built from scratch with vanilla JavaScript
Demonstrates strong understanding of DOM manipulation and event handling
Creative way to present professional information
projects.what_i_learned: Building a terminal emulator taught me deep JavaScript fundamentals including event handling, state management, and creating engaging user interactions without frameworks.

projects.name: Simple but Stylish HTML/CSS Portfolio
projects.description: A clean, professional portfolio website built with HTML and CSS. This project serves as a digital resume and showcase, presenting my work and capabilities through elegant design and smooth animations. It emphasizes accessibility, performance, and a polished user experience.
key_features: CSS animations and transitions for polish
highlights: Focus on clean code and performance
Professional presentation of work and skills
projects.what_i_learned: This project taught me that sometimes simplicity is the most powerful approach. Strong fundamentals in HTML and CSS can create beautiful, performant websites without JavaScript frameworks.

projects.name: Jan Cuts Portfolio
projects.description: A modern, professional portfolio website built for a barber in Ponce, Puerto Rico. This client project showcases the barber's skills, services, and work through an elegant, user-friendly interface. Designed in Figma and built with React and Chakra UI, it demonstrates my ability to deliver client-focused solutions.
key_features: Responsive design optimized for mobile booking
highlights: Real client project delivering business value
Demonstrates ability to work with clients and understand their needs
Built with modern React and component library (Chakra UI)
Focus on conversion and user engagement
projects.what_i_learned: Working with a real client taught me the importance of understanding business needs, clear communication, and creating solutions that drive results. I also learned Chakra UI and improved my React component design skills.
